native_ppt_constraints: Use editable native PPT text boxes for every visible string.
Record selected type roles in per-slide trace fields.
typography_constraints: Title text must be at least forty points.
Body text must be at least eighteen points.
spacing_constraints: Keep enough margin for the largest type role.
composition_constraints: One headline owns the first-read position.
Secondary proof cannot compete with the headline.
bindings.negative_control_failure: Bad memory schema collapses text into equal-size report prose.
bindings.qa_probe: Contact sheet review should show clear reading order before body text is inspected.

native_ppt_constraints: Use native rectangles, guides, and text objects to express zones.
Record zone count and spacing budget in trace.
typography_constraints: Labels remain subordinate to zone structure.
No label may force a zone resize after layout.
spacing_constraints: Outer margin must remain visibly larger than inner gutters.
Every zone must have a deliberate gap from neighboring zones.
composition_constraints: Proof zones must be unequal when priority differs.
Do not create repeated equal-density dashboard cards.
bindings.negative_control_failure: Bad memory schema produces cramped equal panels and weak priority.
bindings.qa_probe: Contact sheet review should show margins and gutters before text detail.

native_ppt_constraints: Build the hero object from editable native PPT shapes.
Record hero object bounds and selected binding id in trace.
typography_constraints: The hero label must stay short enough to preserve the pause.
Supporting labels cannot exceed body minimum size.
spacing_constraints: Hero object needs a clear field around it.
Supporting explanation sits outside the hero field.
composition_constraints: Hero object must occupy forty four to fifty eight percent of the main canvas.
No secondary object may be larger than the hero object.
bindings.negative_control_failure: Bad memory schema repeats proof grids and loses the climax.
bindings.qa_probe: Contact sheet review should identify the hero object before reading labels.

native_ppt_constraints: Use editable native panels, arrows, and labels.
Record before and after panel ids in trace.
typography_constraints: Before and after labels must share the same type role.
Delta annotation must be shorter than either panel label.
spacing_constraints: Panels must share a baseline and a visible gutter.
Delta arrow needs open space around the midpoint.
composition_constraints: The after state must be visually distinct without copying any source layout.
The comparison axis must be readable from the contact sheet.
bindings.negative_control_failure: Bad memory schema leaves a paragraph instead of a visible delta.
bindings.qa_probe: Contact sheet review should show a beforeAfter change without reading all labels.

native_ppt_constraints: Represent the gate with editable native text, shapes, and connectors.
Record public release boundary and source sanitization in trace.
typography_constraints: Gate labels must remain readable at contact-sheet scale.
Release status cannot be hidden in small footnote text.
spacing_constraints: Gate objects must not crowd the primary proof object.
Release boundary labels need a stable alignment zone.
composition_constraints: The workflow gate must be visible but subordinate to the slide job.
Source-boundary evidence must use original labels and shapes.
bindings.negative_control_failure: Bad memory schema claims release readiness without visible boundary checks.
bindings.qa_probe: Trace and contact sheet review should agree on public_blocked release state.
